user.title: Configure Tydom Box
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Delta Dore Tydom box.

data.host: IP Address (optional, leave empty for auto-discovery)

data_description.mac_address: Format: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF (found on the underside of your box)
data_description.password: PIN code printed on your box label
data_description.host: Useful if mDNS discovery does not work on your network

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Tydom box. Check MAC address, password and ensure the box is reachable on your network.
error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Use AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF.

abort.already_configured: This Tydom box is already configured.
